title: Microwave Potato Baker, Red
features: Durable Plastic Construction: Crafted with high-quality plastic, ensuring longevity and resistance to everyday wear and tear
Compact Size: Measures 18 cm in width and length, and 7 cm in height, fitting perfectly in most microwaves
Easy to Use: Simply place your potatoes inside, add water, and microwave for perfectly cooked potatoes every time
Red Finish: Stylish and sleek, this potato baker adds a pop of color to your kitchen counter
Hand Wash Only: For easy cleaning, simply hand wash after use to maintain its quality and appearance
description: Effortlessly bake perfect potatoes with the Good 2 Heat Plus Microwave Potato Baker. This rectangular, 18 cm x 18 cm x 7 cm, plastic baker is designed for convenient microwave cooking. Its red finish adds a pop of color to your kitchen. Despite its compact size, it's perfect for baking one or two potatoes at a time. Hand wash only for easy cleaning. Enjoy perfectly baked potatoes in minutes with this efficient and stylish baker.
